User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account information and spiritual progress totals.

uid.description: The dynamic user ID, matching the Firebase Auth uid.

name.description: The name of the spiritual seeker.

streakDays.description: The current continuous streak of active sadhana in days.

dailyTarget.description: Spiritual target of malas for single days.

createdAt.description: The server-generated timestamp when user first joined.

updatedAt.description: The server-generated timestamp of the last update.

DailyStats.title: Daily Sadhana Stats
DailyStats.description: Track progress and spiritual samyama metrics for a given calendar date.

malasCompleted.description: Count of complete 108 bead chants on this date.

target.description: The daily mala target vow configuration on this date.

diaryChauvihar.description: Whether early dinner vow till sunset was kept.

diaryAhimsa.description: Whether non-violent/compassion speech check was perfect.

diaryKrodhControl.description: Whether equanimity under anger was sustained.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this daily stat entry was updated.

/users/{userId}/dailyStats/{dateStr}.description: Sub-collection document for tracking each day's spiritual records.
